categories.label: Stage I Public Objectives
categories.description: VP from Stage I Public Objectives scored during Status Phase (1 VP each)

categories.label: Stage II Public Objectives
categories.description: VP from Stage II Public Objectives scored during Status Phase (2 VP each)

categories.label: Secret Objectives
categories.description: VP from completed Secret Objectives (max 3, 1 VP each)

categories.label: Custodians Token
categories.description: 1 VP for being the first player to claim Mecatol Rex

categories.label: Imperial / Mecatol VP
categories.description: VP from the Imperial Strategy Card for controlling Mecatol Rex

categories.label: Support for the Throne
categories.description: VP from holding other players' Support for the Throne promissory notes

categories.label: Agenda Phase VP
categories.description: VP awarded by agenda card resolutions

win_condition: First player to reach 10 Victory Points wins immediately
